parents.subject: LU-15259 tests: skip acl tests if no bin/daemon users

commit.subject: LU-13171 utils: add PIN flag for file components
commit.message:
LU-13171 utils: add PIN flag for file components

Add a LCME_FL_PIN flag and "pin" option for "lfs setstripe",
"lfs getstripe", "lfs mirror split/delete", and "lfs find".  This
indicates to "lfs migrate", "lfs mirror split/delete", and space
management tools these component(s) shouldn't be removed from a file.

Access to set/clear the "pin" flag is limited to root, processes
with CAP_SYS_RESOURCE, or GID matching mdt.*.enable_pin_gid=N
(N=-1 allows all groups to set/clear this flag).

*** in-progress patch that I had previously started working on ***

TODO: limit LCME_FL_PIN to GID of mdt.*.enable_pin_gid
      CAP_SYS_RESOURCE to prevent regular users from changing flag.
TODO: check LCME_FL_PIN in "lfs migrate" (to prevent useless
      data copying) and on the MDS during layout swap/split from
      "lfs mirror split/delete" to prevent component removal if
      --force-unpin/LLAPI_MIGRATION_UNPIN option is not specified.
TODO: update automated migration tools (lhsmtool_posix, etc.) to
      honor the LCME_FL_PIN flag set on a file.
TODO: add test cases to confirm correct operation/printing of flag.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Ica5025b870acdacef3615887b6c706eba73ebbe5
